summary: Executed targeted backend pytest + frontend Playwright validation for updated role workflow, owner-only calibration access, crew free-text issue intake with photos, PM/AM notifications, management+owner review continuity, exports, and Sarver-themed UI loading.

issues: Browser console logs hydration warning on Review page: invalid nested element inside <option>.
Analytics page logs Recharts width/height -1 warnings during initial render.

action_items: Review ReviewPage option rendering to remove hydration warning in browser console.
Stabilize chart container sizing in Analytics page to avoid Recharts width/height warnings.
Optional cleanup: legacy backend pytest files still rely on outdated credential/env assumptions when running full-suite baseline.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py remains very large (>1500 lines); split by module to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
test_credentials: Used credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md for GM, Account Manager, Production Manager, Supervisor, and Owner.
seed_data_creation: No seed scripts created. Test records were created through public submission and review flows (including TEST UI Job 106083).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Updated regression coverage is in test_updated_workflow_roles_and_issue_pipeline.py and passes. PM/AM field issue notifications and owner issue-intake visibility were validated with a free-text crew submission containing an issue photo.
rca of the issue: No blocking functional issue reproduced in this iteration. UI console warnings appear to stem from client rendering/layout behavior rather than API failures.
